content: Current explorations of LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be leveraged to fix a critical unstated limitation of the original Self-Refine framework: its reliance on a single, homogeneous feedback perspective per iteration. By integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanism research into Self-Refine's iterative loop, we can create a multi-perspective self-refinement framework that outperforms the original single-perspective approach without adding external data or training overhead.
